axenic_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD (L:D periodic)
axenic_LD.functional_description: Enriched for photosystem I and II components, including genes psbA, psaA, and psaB, reflecting active photosynthesis under diel light:dark cycles.
axenic_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity in axenic cultures under diel light:dark conditions but lose periodicity under extended darkness.
axenic_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence based on transcriptome data and pathway enrichment analysis.

supporting_quotes.quote: We found that transcripts encoding 69% of all Prochlorococcus proteins exhibited 24-h periodicity in the axenic L:D cultures, while only 6% did so through the first 13 h of extended darkness.

The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.

axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.assessment_notes: No specific discussion or data for this cluster in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD (L:D periodic enhanced in coculture)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.functional_description: Includes genes involved in photosynthesis and light harvesting, such as psbA, psbB, psaA, and psaB, with enhanced expression in coculture conditions.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity in both axenic and coculture under diel L:D conditions, with more transcripts retaining periodicity in coculture.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.expression_dynamics: periodic in L:D with coculture enhancement
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence from transcriptomic periodicity and enrichment data.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts retained their periodicity in cocultures versus axenic cultures, both under extended darkness and even during the normal diel L:D cycle.

Many of the increases in transcript abundance for photosystem subunits (e.g., psbA, psbB, psaA, and psaB) seen in the axenic cultures did not occur in the cocultures, suggesting additional energy sources in coculture.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit discussion in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.assessment_notes: No explicit discussion in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darkness
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.assessment_notes: No explicit discussion in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_darkness
axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit discussion in the paper.

coculture_LD.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster coculture_LD (coculture L:D periodic)
coculture_LD.functional_description: Enriched for genes involved in organic compound degradation and salvage pathways, including amino acid metabolism, indicating mixotrophic metabolism in coculture.
coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity in coculture under diel L:D conditions and retain more periodicity than axenic cultures under extended darkness.
coculture_LD.expression_dynamics: periodic in coculture L:D and extended darkness
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence based on transcriptomic and pathway enrichment data.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cocultured, but not axenic, Prochlorococcus cells were enriched in transcripts encoding organic compound degradation/salvage pathways, such as those for amino acids.
More Prochlorococcus transcripts retained their periodicity in cocultures versus axenic cultures, both under extended darkness and even during the normal diel L:D cycle.

coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit discussion in the paper.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit discussion in the paper.

not_periodic.name: Prochlorococcus NATL2A cluster not_periodic
not_periodic.temporal_pattern: Genes that do not exhibit significant 24-h periodicity under any of the tested conditions.

supporting_quotes.quote: Other transcripts did not exhibit periodicity under any conditions (see Fig. 4B to F for representative examples).
